title: Vertex acquires Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $10 billion as biotech M&A booms
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals has agreed to acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals in a $10 billion deal, continuing the ongoing M&A rally in biotechnology. The acquisition signals strong confidence in Crinetics' proprietary pipeline and reflects continued merger activity as well-capitalized biotechs consolidate promising assets ahead of key clinical and regulatory milestones.

title: AI company Anthropic announces it will begin developing drugs of its own
summary: Anthropic, the AI firm behind Claude, has announced plans to enter the pharmaceutical industry and develop drugs independently. This marks a significant shift as an artificial intelligence company moves beyond tool-building into end-to-end drug discovery and development, blurring industry lines between tech and Big Pharma.

title: Online GLP-1 prescriptions are often fast, easy and low on clinical oversight
summary: A new study published in JAMA finds that online prescriptions for GLP-1 weight-loss and diabetes drugs are frequently issued with minimal clinical oversight. The Yale-led secret-shopper investigation raises concerns about patient safety and the growing role of telehealth platforms in dispensing powerful injectable medications without thorough medical evaluation.
